name: Yad Gəlin
overview: On the wedding day of a girl named Hijran, her husband is shot and, in order to prevent the feud between the families from escalating, she is married off to the deceased boy's brother.

trailers.title: Yeni SERİAL (Yad Gəlin) - ARB yeni mövsümə FƏRQLİ SÜRƏTLƏ gəlir - Anons
